title: A Mechanistic Study of Tabular Foundation Models
authors_or_org: Marin Biloš, James T. Wilson, Anderson Schneider, Yuriy Nevmyvaka
memory: Top 5 paper. Covered May 20 2026 arXiv paper on mechanistic analysis of tabular foundation models, similarity-based readouts, permutation invariances, causal interventions, and engineered perturbation failures. Suppress future arXiv/revised/conference/code versions unless the contribution materially changes.

title: Disjoint Generation of Synthetic Data
authors_or_org: Anton Danholt Lautrup, Muhammad Rajabinasab, Tobias Hyrup, Arthur Zimek, Peter Schneider-Kamp
memory: Top 5 paper and TMLR June 2026 item. Covered disjoint generative models for synthetic tabular data: column-wise partitions, separate generators, validator-based joining without common identifiers, privacy-utility-compute tradeoffs, mixed-model synthesis. Suppress OpenReview/TMLR/code/reposted versions.

memory: Top 5 paper and JMLR Volume 27 item. Covered semiparametric/generalized-Bayes correction for misspecified parametric Bayesian models, avoiding nonparametric Bayes factors, with causal gene-expression application. Suppress arXiv/JMLR/code/revised versions unless materially new.
